info.title: CrossplaneSharp.Tool
info.description: (Unofficial C# port of nginxinc/crossplane) CLI tool for parsing, lexing, building, formatting and minifying NGINX configs.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Various operations for NGINX config files.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: parse
commands.description: Parse an NGINX config file to a JSON payload.

options.name: -o
options.description: Write output to a file.

options.name: -i
options.description: Number of spaces to indent output.

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Ignore directives (comma-separated). [default: ]

options.name: --no-catch
options.description: Stop after the first error. [default: False]

options.name: --combine
options.description: Flatten includes into one single config entry. [default: False]

options.name: --single-file
options.description: Do not follow include directives. [default: False]

options.name: --include-comments
options.description: Include comments in JSON output. [default: False]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Raise errors for unknown directives. [default: False]

commands.name: build
commands.description: Build NGINX config files from a JSON payload.

options.name: -v
options.description: Print paths of written files. [default: False]

options.name: -d
options.description: Base directory to build in.

options.name: -f
options.description: Overwrite existing files without prompting. [default: False]

options.name: -i
options.description: Spaces per indent level. [default: 4]

options.name: -t
options.description: Indent with tabs instead of spaces. [default: False]

options.name: --no-headers
options.description: Do not write the header comment to configs. [default: False]

options.name: --stdout
options.description: Write configs to stdout instead of files. [default: False]

commands.name: lex
commands.description: Tokenise an NGINX config file to a JSON array.

options.name: -o
options.description: Write output to a file.

options.name: -i
options.description: Number of spaces to indent output.

options.name: -n
options.description: Include line numbers in JSON. [default: False]

commands.name: minify
commands.description: Remove all whitespace from an NGINX config.

options.name: -o
options.description: Write output to a file.

options.name: -o
options.description: Write output to a file.

options.name: -i
options.description: Spaces per indent level. [default: 4]

options.name: -t
options.description: Indent with tabs instead of spaces. [default: False]
